pages.title: Linear
pages.content:
# Linear

> Linear is a purpose-built tool for planning and building products. Meet the system for modern software development. Streamline issues, projects, and product roadmaps.

## Documentation

Get an overview of Linear's features, integrations, and how to use them.

### Getting started

- [Start Guide](https://linear.app/docs/start-guide.md)
- [Concepts](https://linear.app/docs/conceptual-model.md)
- [Download Linear](https://linear.app/docs/get-the-app.md)

### Account

- [Preferences](https://linear.app/docs/account-preferences.md)
- [Profile](https://linear.app/docs/profile.md)
- [Notifications](https://linear.app/docs/notifications.md)
- [Code & reviews](https://linear.app/docs/code-and-reviews.md)
- [Security & Access](https://linear.app/docs/security-and-access.md)

### AI

- [Linear Agent](https://linear.app/docs/linear-agent.md)
- [AI Agents](https://linear.app/docs/agents-in-linear.md)
- [Assign and delegate issues](https://linear.app/docs/assigning-issues.md)
- [Triage Intelligence](https://linear.app/docs/triage-intelligence.md)
- [Code Intelligence](https://linear.app/docs/code-intelligence.md)
- [Coding sessions](https://linear.app/docs/coding-sessions.md)
- [MCP server](https://linear.app/docs/mcp.md)

### Your sidebar

- [Inbox](https://linear.app/docs/inbox.md)
- [My issues](https://linear.app/docs/my-issues.md)
- [Pulse](https://linear.app/docs/pulse.md)
- [Reviews](https://linear.app/docs/diffs.md)
- [Favorites](https://linear.app/docs/favorites.md)

### Teams

- [Teams](https://linear.app/docs/teams.md)
- [Private teams](https://linear.app/docs/private-teams.md)
- [Sub-teams](https://linear.app/docs/sub-teams.md)
- [Team pages](https://linear.app/docs/default-team-pages.md)
- [Issue status](https://linear.app/docs/configuring-workflows.md)
- [Triage](https://linear.app/docs/triage.md)

### Issues

- [Create issues](https://linear.app/docs/creating-issues.md)
- [Edit issues](https://linear.app/docs/editing-issues.md)
- [Assign and delegate issues](https://linear.app/docs/assigning-issues.md)
- [Select issues](https://linear.app/docs/select-issues.md)
- [Parent and sub-issues](https://linear.app/docs/parent-and-sub-issues.md)
- [Issue templates](https://linear.app/docs/issue-templates.md)
- [Issue documents](https://linear.app/docs/issue-documents.md)
- [Comments and reactions](https://linear.app/docs/comment-on-issues.md)
- [Editor](https://linear.app/docs/editor.md)
- [Delete and archive issues](https://linear.app/docs/delete-archive-issues.md)
- [Customer Requests](https://linear.app/docs/customer-requests.md)
- [Releases](https://linear.app/docs/releases.md)

### Issue properties

- [Due dates](https://linear.app/docs/due-dates.md)
- [Estimates](https://linear.app/docs/estimates.md)
- [Issue relations](https://linear.app/docs/issue-relations.md)
- [Issue labels](https://linear.app/docs/labels.md)
- [Priority](https://linear.app/docs/priority.md)
- [SLAs](https://linear.app/docs/sla.md)

### Projects

- [Projects](https://linear.app/docs/projects.md)
- [Initiative and Project updates](https://linear.app/docs/initiative-and-project-updates.md)
- [Project milestones](https://linear.app/docs/project-milestones.md)

- [Project dependencies](https://linear.app/docs/project-dependencies.md)

### Initiatives

### Cycles

### Views

### Find and filter

- [Asks with Slack](https://linear.app/docs/linear-asks-slack.md)

### Integrations

- [Integration Directory](https://linear.app/docs/integration-directory.md)

### Analytics

- [Dashboards](https://linear.app/docs/dashboards.md)
- [Insights](https://linear.app/docs/insights.md)
- [Project graph](https://linear.app/docs/project-graph.md)
- [Cycle graph](https://linear.app/docs/cycle-graph.md)
- [Exporting Data](https://linear.app/docs/exporting-data.md)

### Administration

- [Workspaces](https://linear.app/docs/workspaces.md)
- [Login methods](https://linear.app/docs/login-methods.md)
- [Invite members](https://linear.app/docs/invite-members.md)
- [Members and roles](https://linear.app/docs/members-roles.md)

- [SAML](https://linear.app/docs/saml-and-access-control.md)
- [SCIM](https://linear.app/docs/scim.md)
- [API and Webhooks](https://linear.app/docs/api-and-webhooks.md)
- [Third-Party App Approvals](https://linear.app/docs/third-party-application-approvals.md)
- [Billing and plans](https://linear.app/docs/billing-and-plans.md)
- [AI Credits](https://linear.app/docs/ai-credits.md)
- [Audit log](https://linear.app/docs/audit-log.md)
- [Importer](https://linear.app/docs/import-issues.md)
- [Exporting Data](https://linear.app/docs/exporting-data.md)

## Developers

Learn about building apps and integrations for Linear using the GraphQL API and TypeScript SDK.

### GraphQL Schema

- [GraphQL SDL Schema Definition](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/linear/linear/master/packages/sdk/src/schema.graphql)

### GraphQL API

- [Getting started](https://linear.app/developers/graphql.md)
- [Pagination](https://linear.app/developers/pagination.md)
- [Filtering](https://linear.app/developers/filtering.md)
- [Rate limiting](https://linear.app/developers/rate-limiting.md)
- [Deprecations](https://linear.app/developers/deprecations.md)
- [Webhooks](https://linear.app/developers/webhooks.md)
- [Attachments](https://linear.app/developers/attachments.md)
- [Managing Customers](https://linear.app/developers/managing-customers.md)

### Authentication

- [OAuth 2.0 authentication](https://linear.app/developers/oauth-2-0-authentication.md)
- [OAuth actor authorization](https://linear.app/developers/oauth-actor-authorization.md)
- [OAuth application manifests](https://linear.app/developers/oauth-app-manifests.md)
- [File storage authentication](https://linear.app/developers/file-storage-authentication.md)

### Agents

- [Agent Interaction Guidelines (AIG)](https://linear.app/developers/aig.md)
- [Getting Started](https://linear.app/developers/agents.md)
- [Developing the Agent Interaction](https://linear.app/developers/agent-interaction.md)
- [Interaction Best Practices](https://linear.app/developers/agent-best-practices.md)
- [Signals](https://linear.app/developers/agent-signals.md)

### TypeScript SDK

- [Getting started](https://linear.app/developers/sdk.md)
- [Fetching & modifying data](https://linear.app/developers/sdk-fetching-and-modifying-data.md)
- [Errors](https://linear.app/developers/sdk-errors.md)
- [Advanced usage](https://linear.app/developers/advanced-usage.md)
- [Webhooks](https://linear.app/developers/sdk-webhooks.md)
- [Migrating from 1.x to 2.x](https://linear.app/developers/migrating-from-1-x-to-2-x.md)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/linear/linear/tree/master/packages/sdk)

### Guides

- [How to upload a file to Linear](https://linear.app/developers/how-to-upload-a-file-to-linear.md)
- [Create issues using linear.new](https://linear.app/developers/create-issues-using-linear-new.md)
- [Integration Directory](https://linear.app/developers/integration-directory.md)

[Sign up](https://docs.linear.app/signup)[Open app](https://docs.linear.app/signup)

# Linear Docs

Get an overview of Linear's features, integrations, and how to use them.

## Popular

[**Start Guide**\\ \\ Learn how to use the app and follow best practices for software building](https://docs.linear.app/docs/start-guide) [**Import Issues**\\ \\ Quickly move issues from your existing issue tracker into Linear](https://docs.linear.app/docs/import-issues) [**Projects**\\ \\ Shape your product ideas and plan what to build next](https://docs.linear.app/docs/projects) [**GitHub Automations**\\ \\ Link issues and automate pull request workflows](https://docs.linear.app/docs/github)

## Linear basics

[**Workflows**\\ \\ Create new statuses and design custom issue workflows](https://docs.linear.app/docs/configuring-workflows) [**Select Issues**\\ \\ Learn how to take actions on multiple issues at a time](https://docs.linear.app/docs/select-issues) [**Issue Relations**\\ \\ Indicate blocked, blocking, related, and duplicate issues](https://docs.linear.app/docs/issue-relations) [**Display Options**\\ \\ Order, sort, and group issues and projects and customize views](https://docs.linear.app/docs/display-options) [**Triage**\\ \\ Use a special inbox for issues from integrations and other teams](https://docs.linear.app/docs/triage) [**Parent and Sub-Issues**\\ \\ Break down larger tasks into smaller pieces of work](https://docs.linear.app/docs/parent-and-sub-issues) [**Notifications**\\ \\ Learn how to manage notifications and stay up to date](https://docs.linear.app/docs/notifications) [**Teams**\\ \\ Create teams in your workspace to organize different types of work functions](https://docs.linear.app/docs/teams)

[Docs](https://developers.linear.app/docs) [Developers](https://developers.linear.app/developers) [Learn](https://developers.linear.app/learn) [Contact support](https://developers.linear.app/contact/support)

# Linear Developers

Learn about building apps and integrations for Linear using the GraphQL API and TypeScript SDK.

## Getting Started

[**GraphQL API**\\ \\ Learn how to use the GraphQL API to query and mutate your data](https://developers.linear.app/developers/graphql) [**Authentication**\\ \\ Use OAuth 2.0 or personal API keys to authenticate your requests to the Linear API](https://developers.linear.app/developers/oauth-2-0-authentication) [**Agents**\\ \\ How to best integrate an AI agent into Linear](https://developers.linear.app/developers/agents) [**TypeScript SDK**\\ \\ Install the Linear SDK to use strongly typed models and operations](https://developers.linear.app/developers/sdk)

## Guides

[**Upload a file**\\ \\ Learn how to reference a file in markdown content, or upload with the API](https://developers.linear.app/developers/how-to-upload-a-file-to-linear) [**Create issues via URL**\\ \\ Open issue creation with pre-filled fields from a URL](https://developers.linear.app/developers/create-issues-using-linear-new) [**CLI importer**\\ \\ Import data from other services into Linear](https://github.com/linear/linear/tree/master/packages/import)

## Resources

[**Changelog**\\ \\ Stay up to date with the latest changes to Linear and the API](https://developers.linear.app/changelog) [**Brand Guidelines**\\ \\ Resources and assets for presenting the Linear brand](https://developers.linear.app/brand) [**Agent Interaction Guidelines**\\ \\ Principles and practices for designing agent interactions](https://developers.linear.app/developers/aig)

 - [How to upload a file to Linear](https://linear.app/developers/how-to-upload-a-file-to-linear)
 - [Create issues using linear.new](https://linear.app/developers/create-issues-using-linear-new)
 - [Integration Directory](https://linear.app/developers/integration-directory)
 

[Docs](https://linear.app/docs) [Developers](https://linear.app/developers) [Learn](https://linear.app/learn) [Contact support](https://linear.app/contact/support)

# Linear Developers

Learn about building apps and integrations for Linear using the GraphQL API and TypeScript SDK.

## Getting Started

[**GraphQL API**\\ \\ Learn how to use the GraphQL API to query and mutate your data](https://linear.app/developers/graphql) [**Authentication**\\ \\ Use OAuth 2.0 or personal API keys to authenticate your requests to the Linear API](https://linear.app/developers/oauth-2-0-authentication) [**Agents**\\ \\ How to best integrate an AI agent into Linear](https://linear.app/developers/agents) [**TypeScript SDK**\\ \\ Install the Linear SDK to use strongly typed models and operations](https://linear.app/developers/sdk)

## Guides

[**Upload a file**\\ \\ Learn how to reference a file in markdown content, or upload with the API](https://linear.app/developers/how-to-upload-a-file-to-linear) [**Create issues via URL**\\ \\ Open issue creation with pre-filled fields from a URL](https://linear.app/developers/create-issues-using-linear-new) [**CLI importer**\\ \\ Import data from other services into Linear](https://github.com/linear/linear/tree/master/packages/import)

## Resources

[**Changelog**\\ \\ Stay up to date with the latest changes to Linear and the API](https://linear.app/changelog) [**Brand Guidelines**\\ \\ Resources and assets for presenting the Linear brand](https://linear.app/brand) [**Agent Interaction Guidelines**\\ \\ Principles and practices for designing agent interactions](https://linear.app/developers/aig)
